reviews.review_description:
If you are in need of a co-op game to play with friends that is not a shooter, jump aboard this one. 
I did not come across any horror , just some dark areas that could be scary but most will enjoy the hunting down your fellow players as the security guard, probably more to do for co-op players than solo players, not a bad thing as there are not too many like this for a group to play .
Good Fun.

reviews.review_title: I Was the Security… Until I Wasn’t
reviews.review_description:
This game will be really in its element when playing with friends, both fun and chaotic.  The graphics were basic but ok, love the sound affects especially when you are whispered too I actually checked behind me at one point
I did have an issue, I dropped a key card, no matter what I did I could not pick it up, I even reset floor level and the boundary but I could not retrieve it so had to restart the level that said it was in single player overall, it was still a really enjoyable but feel it that just needs a bit more depth and finish to be a 5-star hit.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Ill take a look into that card issue and more content will be coming as the game comes out of early access.

reviews.review_description: It’s fun when you get to to work but when me and a friend tried to play it was a pain the room would crash and if it did he would crash but when it worked it was fun but need to be tweaked

developer_response.body: Hey, I'm glad you are enjoying the game! When you get the room crash error its best for both players to reset back to the main menu lobby and try again. If your able to email me at admin@securitycontrolgame.com with just some general info (level played, won / loss, etc) of what you were doing when it crashed that would be very helpful!

reviews.review_title: buy it!! you won't regret it
reviews.review_description: really fun game! i like how you can play as the guard too. i have a headset but some of my friends don't so the fact i can play in vr with my friends on pc is really cool

Such a clever little game, and comes into its own in multiplayer / Co-op ! 

Evade the security guard while completing tasks to earn money to upgrade your apps to assist you in further tasks. 

Has been updated since previous reviews and the devs continue to make it even better 



Very entertaining game
